case_title: MICHAEL BROWN JR. VS. THOMAS THARAYIL

docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 (DOCUMENT STAMPED: "BY FAX") FILED BY BROWN JR., MICHAEL AS TO DEFENDANT THARAYIL, THOMAS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-11-2018 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
ORDER RE: DISMISSED W/O PREJUDICE (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. DEFENDANT THOMAS THARAYIL IS PRESENT. PROOF OF SERVICE IS UNTIMELY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: JOHNATHAN POLLAND; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506

REMARK:FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 7/29/2022 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 681.53.
